192 How to Judge a Horoscope
Education, in common parlance, means the acquisition
of certain distinctions having undergone the necessary
courses of study in recognised institutions and not the
acquisition of knowledge by self-study.
Chart No. 81.—Born on 23-11-1902 at 5-16 a.m. (L.M.T.)
(Lat. 23° 8' N.. long. 72° 40' E.)
Balance of Venus Dasa at birth : Years 13-11-12.
The Fourth House.—In Chart No. 81, Capricorn
becomes the fourth. It is occupied by Saturn and Jupiter,
the latter in neecha but having obtained neecha-bhanga. In
the Navamsa, the fourth is free from association or aspect.
The Fourth Lord.—The fourth lord Saturn, happening
also to be Yogakaraka, is in the fourth, in association with
Jupiter lord of the 3rd and the 6th.
Vidyakaraka.
